tagline: Browse, post, and interact across the fediverse

env.name: MASTODON_PROVIDERS
env.description: Comma-separated provider names for multi-instance (e.g. personal,project)

setup.blurb: Connect to Mastodon for timeline browsing, search, notifications, and social interactions. Multi-instance.
setup.help_text: Generate an access token at Preferences > Development > New Application on your Mastodon instance. Grant read scopes for read-only use, or read+write for full interaction.

fields.label: Access Token
fields.help: Preferences > Development > New Application > Access Token

fields.label: Enable Write Operations
fields.help: Set to 'true' to enable posting, favouriting, following, and other write operations

highlights.text: Timelines — home, local, federated, hashtag, and list feeds
Search — accounts, statuses, and hashtags across the fediverse
Notifications — mentions, boosts, favourites, follow requests
Compose — post, reply, boost, favourite, bookmark
Multi-instance — manage multiple accounts from one server
Write-gated — posting disabled by default, explicit opt-in

readme:
### What it does

Mastodon Blade MCP gives your AI agent access to the Mastodon social network — reading timelines, searching content, managing notifications, and composing posts. It works with any Mastodon-compatible instance (Mastodon, Pleroma, GoToSocial, Akkoma) through the standard Mastodon API.

Your agent can catch up on your home timeline, search for discussions on a topic, check notifications, and draft or publish posts — all from a single conversation.

### Multi-instance support

Configure multiple accounts across different instances using `MASTODON_PROVIDERS`. Each provider gets its own instance URL and token, and your agent can switch between them within a session. Useful for managing personal and project accounts separately.

### Safety model

All write operations (posting, replying, boosting, favouriting, following) are disabled by default:

- **Read-only by default** — timelines, search, and notifications work immediately
- **Write gate** — set `MASTODON_WRITE_ENABLED=true` to unlock posting and interactions
- **Confirm gate** — each write tool requires `confirm: true` per call

This prevents accidental posts or follows while still allowing full read access for monitoring and research.

scenarios.label: Catch up on the fediverse
scenarios.body: Pull the home timeline and notifications, summarise trending discussions, and flag any mentions or replies that need a response.

scenarios.label: Research a topic across instances
scenarios.body: Search for hashtags and accounts related to a topic, review recent statuses from key accounts, and bookmark notable posts for later reference.

scenarios.label: Draft and publish a thread
scenarios.body: Compose a multi-part thread with content warnings and hashtags, preview the posts, then publish them sequentially with reply chains intact.
